title: Adaptive crosshair
description: The Adaptive Crosshair is a lightweight Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21+ which morphs your crosshair to match the item you’re holding—sword, pickaxe, or bow.
body:
✨ Adaptive Crosshair Mod  
Elevate your Minecraft experience with the Adaptive Crosshair, a sleek HUD enhancement that makes your gameplay feel more immersive and intuitive. Instead of a static crosshair, this mod intelligently morphs its design depending on the tool or weapon you’re holding:

⚔️ Sword – A bold, combat-ready crosshair that sharpens your focus in battle.

⛏️ Pickaxe – A precise, utilitarian crosshair optimized for mining efficiency.

🏹 Bow – A dynamic, aiming-friendly crosshair that adjusts for ranged accuracy.

By seamlessly adapting to your current item, the Adaptive Crosshair not only adds visual polish but also improves functionality, helping you instantly recognize your role—whether you’re fighting, mining, or sniping from afar. It’s the perfect blend of style and utility, designed for players who value both aesthetics and performance.
